---
title: "Comprehensive Geospatial & Analytical Solutions"
---


<div class="container">
  <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 g-4">
  
    <div class="col">
      <div class="card h-100 text-center p-4">
        <div class="card-body">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #2A5A5C;"></i>
          <h5 class="card-title mt-3">Geospatial Consulting</h5>
          <a href="services/consulting.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-3">Learn More</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col">
      <div class="card h-100 text-center p-4">
        <div class="card-body">
          <i class="bi bi-database" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #2A5A5C;"></i>
          <h5 class="card-title mt-3">Data Cleaning</h5>
          <a href="services/cleaning.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-3">Learn More</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col">
      <div class="card h-100 text-center p-4">
        <div class="card-body">
          <i class="bi bi-mortarboard" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #2A5A5C;"></i>
          <h5 class="card-title mt-3">Training & Capacity</h5>
          <a href="services/training.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-3">Learn More</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col">
      <div class="card h-100 text-center p-4">
        <div class="card-body">
          <i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #2A5A5C;"></i>
          <h5 class="card-title mt-3">Analytical Support</h5>
          <a href="services/analytical.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-3">Learn More</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
